resources.string: 1 item added to story. 1 item was in there already.
1 item added to story. %d items were in there already.
A network or server error has occurred.
A new way to protect your memories
No apps available to complete this action.
The image will be downloaded to your phone before being added to the album.
The image will be downloaded to your tablet before being added to the album.
These items will be downloaded to your phone before being added to the album.
These items will be downloaded to your tablet before being added to the album.
The video will be downloaded to your phone before being added to the album.
The video will be downloaded to your tablet before being added to the album.
Missing someone? Add people or pets to easily find all their photos in one place.
Select faces to add to the People and pets page.
Add people and pets to automatically group all their photos together. It makes finding your best shots easier than ever.
Missing someone? Add people to easily find all their photos in one place.
Select faces to add to the People page.
Add people to automatically group all their photos together. It makes finding your best shots easier than ever.
Want your pictures to pop? Swipe up on a picture or video in Gallery to see the best edits and effects to apply.
Can\'t delete or rename albums you didn\'t create.
Create a new album and add pictures and videos manually.
Create an album that automatically collects pictures of people you select.
Create a group of related albums.
Create an album that automatically updates to include pictures of people you select.
Create an album you can share.
Select up to 4 albums to show on the cover screen.
This album is hidden and can\'t be opened from the Home screen.
There\'s already an album with that name.
Any photos and videos already in the album will remain even if they don\'t have all the selected people and pets.
All the selected images are already in favourites.
All the selected items are already in favourites.

Only pictures and videos with all the selected people will be added to the album from now on. All pictures and videos already in the album will remain even if they don\'t have all the selected people.
All the selected videos are already in favourites.
All those items were already in the story.
Player is not available. Check the network status and connected device.
Also delete all similar images in this group
Also delete the rest of the burst shot
Also delete the rest of the burst shot
Also delete the rest of the Single take set
Also move all similar images in this group
Also move the rest of the burst shot
Also move the rest of the burst shot
Also move the rest of the Single take set
Can\'t use videos to create GIFs. Videos deselected.
Another action already in progress. Try again later.
%1$s has been disabled. Go to Settings and enable %2$s.
The following permissions are required for the app service. For optional permissions, the default functionality of the service is turned on, but not allowed.
If you enjoy using %1$s, take a moment to rate it in the %2$s. Thanks for your support!
Are you sure you want to delete everything from your Gallery?
Are you sure you want to delete everything from your Gallery?\10\10These items will also be deleted from your synced devices and moved to the Recycle Bin in %s.
Are you sure you want to delete everything from your Gallery?\10\10These items will also be deleted from your synced devices and moved to the Recycle bin in %s.
Are you sure you want to move everything from your Gallery to the Recycle bin?
Are you sure you want to move everything from your Gallery to the Recycle Bin?\10\10These items will also be deleted from your synced devices and moved to the Recycle Bin in %s.
Are you sure you want to move everything from your Gallery to the Recycle bin?\10\10These items will also be deleted from your synced devices and moved to the Recycle bin %s.
Back up SD card to OneDrive
Keep your SD card pictures and videos safe and accessible anywhere.
Start syncing with OneDrive to use this feature.
Add this plan to connect to a new mobile network.
This device can be added to %s.
This device can be added to %s and other apps.
The device can be signed in to your %s.
Pay or send money to the owner of this QR code.
You don\'t have a picture of %s in your contacts. Add this picture to their contact info so you can see their face when they call or message you.
Your pictures of them will be combined under the name %s.
Your pictures of them will appear under the same face in search results.
Select a name to merge the pictures under.
The image may have been tampered with, modified in an unknown app, or edited with content credentials turned off.
Can\'t add to shared albums from that app.
Can\'t delete image. Your %s is locked due to a personal data request.
Can\'t delete video. Your %s is locked due to a personal data request.
Can\'t download image. Your %s is locked due to a personal data request.
Can\'t download images. Your %s is locked due to a personal data request.
Can\'t download items. Your %s is locked due to a personal data request.
To use this feature, you need to download and install software from the Galaxy Store, but there was an unknown error installing the Galaxy Store app on your phone.
Can\'t download video. Your %s is locked due to a personal data request.
Can\'t download videos. Your %s is locked due to a personal data request.
Can\'t edit image. Your %s is locked due to a personal data request.
Can\'t edit images or videos in %s.
Can\'t open file. File type not supported.
Can\'t play video. Your %s is locked due to a personal data request.
Can\'t restore image. Your %s is locked due to a personal data request.
Can\'t restore items while connected to a mobile hotspot.
Can\'t restore video. Your %s is locked due to a personal data request.
Can\'t change the date, time, or location of a file with that format.
Can\'t change the date, time, or location of files with those formats.
Can\'t connect to %s. Check your network connection and try again.
The Favourite album won\'t be deleted. It will stay in your albums.
The Recent album won\'t be deleted. It will stay in your albums.
The Recent and Favourite albums won\'t be deleted. They\'ll stay in your albums.
Can\'t enter emojis or special characters.
Can\'t move an empty album out of %s.
Can\'t move empty albums out of %s.
Can\'t move albums and groups without any images or videos out of %s.
Can\'t move a group without any images or videos out of %s.
Can\'t move groups without any images or videos out of %s.
Can\'t move albums or groups into an album. Select a group instead.
Can\'t move an empty album to your personal profile.
Can\'t move empty albums to your personal profile.
Can\'t move an empty album to %s.
Can\'t move albums and groups without any images or videos to %s.
Can\'t move albums and groups without any images or videos to your personal profile.
Can\'t move a group without any images or videos to %s.
Can\'t move a group without any images or videos to your personal profile.
Can\'t move groups without any images or videos to %s.
Can\'t move groups without any images or videos to your personal profile.
The Favourite album won\'t be moved to the Recycle bin. It will stay in your albums.
The Recent album won\'t be moved to the Recycle bin. It will stay in your albums.
The Recent and Favourite albums won\'t be moved to the Recycle bin. They\'ll stay in your albums.
Can\'t remove all items from a story.
Can\'t remove everything shown in the story.
Can\'t share a group without any images or videos in it.
Can\'t share albums and groups without any images or videos in them.
Can\'t share groups without any images or videos in them.
Couldn\'t group your images. Some may not have been analysed yet.
Can\'t start an album name with a full stop.
Can\'t add tag to these images. Files corrupt or copyright protected.
Can\'t add tag to these items. Files corrupt or copyright protected.
Can\'t add tag to these videos. Files corrupt or copyright protected.
Can\'t add tag to this image. File corrupt or copyright protected.
Can\'t add tag to this video. File corrupt or copyright protected.
Can\'t use Instant slow-mo because video speed has been changed.
Can\'t use Instant slow-mo on this type of video.
Mirroring the slideshow on the connected device. Restart the slideshow to view it full screen on the connected device.
Can\'t use this function while Maximum power saving mode is on.
Can\'t add items stored in the cloud to movies.
Can\'t add videos stored in the cloud to collages.
Can\'t add videos stored in the cloud to movies.
Can\'t make long exposure from this motion photo.
Can\'t play video. File type not supported.
Can\'t use cloud files to create movies. Cloud files deselected.
Can\'t use GIFs to create movies. GIFs deselected.
Can\'t use that character in tags.
Unable to launch application. Unknown error.
Can\'t copy pictures or videos while downloading from the cloud.
Can\'t move pictures or videos while downloading from the cloud.
Check your network connection and try again.
Checking for images and videos to paste…
To continue, agree to the following:
Allow usage of network connections in %s (including in the background)
Allow %s to access the following data:
Allow %s to use network connections and access the following data:
Show where your shots were taken?
Select the categories to show when you open the Search tab.
The %1$s album isn\'t synced with the cloud. This image needs to be downloaded so it can be copied to %2$s.
The %1$s album isn\'t synced with the cloud. These images need to be downloaded so they can be copied to %2$s.
The %1$s album isn\'t synced with the cloud. These items need to be downloaded so they can be copied to %2$s.
Couldn\'t restore %1$d image. The image was restored or deleted in the %2$s app.
Couldn\'t restore %1$d images. These images were restored or deleted in the %2$s app.
Couldn\'t restore %1$d items. These items were restored or deleted in the %2$s app.
Allow the %s permission to sync data.
Sync your images and videos with the cloud to keep them safe and up to date on all your devices.
The images and videos stored in your cloud won\'t be shown in Gallery anymore.
The %1$s album isn\'t synced with the cloud. This video needs to be downloaded so it can be copied to %2$s.
The %1$s album isn\'t synced with the cloud. These videos need to be downloaded so they can be copied to %2$s.
Analyse and identify what\'s in your images so you can create auto updating albums and get improved stories, suggestions, and search results.
To create auto updating albums and get better stories, suggestions, and search results, turn on %s in Settings.
Can\'t include more than %d images in one collage.
This collection organises your screenshots into categories. Organising them all can take some time.
Connect to a network to see background music suggestions.
Connect to a network to see your invitations.
Contact updated with most recent picture.
Only the album will be deleted. The pictures and videos in the album will remain in Gallery.
Only the albums will be deleted. The pictures and videos in the albums will remain in Gallery.
There\'s already an item named %s in the selected album.
%1$d files copied. Couldn\'t copy %2$d files in %3$s. Download these files, then try again.
%1$d files copied. Couldn\'t copy 1 file in %2$s. Download this file, then try again.
1 file copied. Couldn\'t copy %1$d files in %2$s. Download these files, then try again.
1 file copied. Couldn\'t copy 1 file in %s. Download this file, then try again.
Couldn\'t add item to shared album because it couldn\'t be found.
Couldn\'t add items to shared album because they couldn\'t be found.
Connect to a network to create this shared album.
Couldn\'t delete shared album. Try again.
Couldn\'t delete shared album. Check your network connection and try again.
Couldn\'t delete shared albums. Try again.
Couldn\'t delete shared albums. Check your network connection and try again.
Connect to a network to download this image.
Couldn\'t download image. Check your network connection and try again.
Clear some space on your phone to download this image.
Connect to a network to download these images.
Couldn\'t download images. Check your network connection and try again.
Clear some space on your phone to download these images.
Connect to a network to download these items.
Couldn\'t download items. Check your network connection and try again.
Clear some space on your phone to download these items.
Wait for your images and videos to finish being moved from Samsung Cloud to OneDrive, then try again.
Connect to a network to download this video.
Couldn\'t download video. Check your network connection and try again.
Clear some space on your phone to download this video.
Connect to a network to download these videos.
Couldn\'t download videos. Check your network connection and try again.
Clear some space on your phone to download these videos.
Couldn\'t move image to the Recycle bin. Try again.
Couldn\'t move images to the Recycle bin. Try again.
Couldn\'t move items to the Recycle bin. Try again.
Couldn\'t move video to the Recycle bin. Try again.
Couldn\'t move videos to the Recycle bin. Try again.
Auto Blocker is on with maximum restrictions. To protect your security, shared albums can\'t be opened.
Connect to a network to remove an image from this album.
Connect to a network to remove images from this album.
Connect to a network to remove items from this album.
Couldn\'t remove you from shared album. Try again.
Couldn\'t remove you from shared album. Check your network connection and try again.
Connect to a network to remove a video from this album.
Connect to a network to remove videos from this album.
Couldn\'t rename shared album. Try again.
Couldn\'t rename shared album. Check your network connection and try again.
Connect to a network to add an image to this album.
Connect to a network to add images to this album.
Connect to a network to add items to this album.
Connect to a network to add a video to this album.
Connect to a network to add videos to this album.
Couldn\'t connect. Check your network connection and try again.
Create a new album to share.
Select a sequence of images and combine them into an animated image.
Can\'t include more than %d items in one movie.
Can\'t use this video type to create movies. Video deselected.
Manually create your own movie with full control of the music, images, videos, and more.
Save your changes to this image or discard them?
Gallery can detect which pictures and videos were taken on trips and turn them into travel stories.
Automatically get stories made from your trips.
Get personalised travel stories made from the pictures and videos you take on trips.
Gallery can detect which pictures and videos were taken at specific places and create stories highlighting those places.
Delete 1 album and the 1 item in it?
Delete 1 album and the %d items in it?
Delete %d albums and the 1 item in them?
Delete %1$d albums and the %2$d items in them?
%1$d of %2$d items removed. %3$d image couldn\'t be removed because it\'s still being uploaded.
%1$d of %2$d items removed. %3$d items couldn\'t be removed because they\'re still being uploaded.
%1$d of %2$d items removed. %3$d video couldn\'t be removed because it\'s still being uploaded.

Delete 1 group, 1 album, and the %d items in them?

Delete %d groups, 1 album, and the 1 item in them?
Delete %1$d groups, 1 album, and the %2$d items in them?
Delete %1$d groups, %2$d albums, and the 1 item in them?
Delete %1$d groups, %2$d albums, and the %3$d items in them?
Delete %1$d groups of similar images and %2$d other items?
Delete 1 group of similar images and 1 other item?
This album and any images or videos it contains will be deleted for you and all of its members.
Deleted items will stay in the Recycle bin for 30 days before they\'re deleted forever.
Deleting item %1$d of %2$d from Recycle bin…
Delete video clip from motion photo?
Video clip removed from Motion photo.
Video clips removed from Motion photos.
To protect your privacy, this image will be deleted from all synced devices. The copy in OneDrive will be moved to the Recycle Bin.
To protect your privacy, this image will be deleted from all synced devices. The copy in Samsung Cloud will be moved to the Recycle bin.
To protect your privacy, these images will be deleted from all synced devices. The copies in OneDrive will be moved to the Recycle Bin.
To protect your privacy, these images will be deleted from all synced devices. The copies in Samsung Cloud will be moved to the Recycle bin.
To protect your privacy, these items will be deleted from all synced devices. The copies in OneDrive will be moved to the Recycle Bin.
To protect your privacy, these items will be deleted from all synced devices. The copies in Samsung Cloud will be moved to the Recycle bin.
To protect your privacy, this video will be deleted from all synced devices. The copy in OneDrive will be moved to the Recycle Bin.
To protect your privacy, this video will be deleted from all synced devices. The copy in Samsung Cloud will be moved to the Recycle bin.
To protect your privacy, these videos will be deleted from all synced devices. The copies in OneDrive will be moved to the Recycle Bin.
To protect your privacy, these videos will be deleted from all synced devices. The copies in Samsung Cloud will be moved to the Recycle bin.
Automatically upscale the resolution when you crop or remaster an image or when you change the key image on a motion photo.
Control the options and info available when viewing individual images and videos.
Discover smart new ways to improve your photos.
Double tap and hold, then drag to reorder.
Double tap to expand the list.
To use this function, download the following app:\10\10%s
Download Chrome Browser to go to URL.
%1$d of %2$d items downloaded. %3$d image couldn\'t be downloaded because it\'s still being uploaded.
%1$d of %2$d items downloaded. %3$d items couldn\'t be downloaded because they\'re still being uploaded.
%1$d of %2$d items downloaded. %3$d video couldn\'t be downloaded because it\'s still being uploaded.
Download OneDrive from the Play Store to upgrade your storage.
Downloading image and fixing lens distortion…
Downloading image and removing lens flare…
Download Samsung Internet from Google Play to go to website.
Item at position %d cannot be dragged.
Do you want to delete this item?
This item is no longer available.
Do you want to unlock it now?
Combine and edit the front and rear camera videos.
There\'s already a group with that name.
Delete duplicate images and videos to save storage space.
Want your pictures to pop? Swipe up on a picture or video in Gallery or tap the 4-star icon below it to see the best edits and effects to apply.
Check the %1$sTerms and Conditions%2$s for more about intelligent features.
Choose who you want in the album, then Gallery will automatically suggest pictures of those people to add.
Add your pictures and videos to albums to keep them organised.
We\'ll suggest new GIFs, collages, and more made from your pictures and videos here.
Tap the Heart icon on your favourite shots so you can find them here fast.
Pictures and videos with location tags will automatically be organised here based on where they were taken.
Experience your adventures again in curated collections automatically made from your pictures and videos.
After you take some pictures and videos, they\'ll be organised here based on the people, places, and things in them.
As your gallery grows, we\'ll automatically create collections of the people, places, and events you capture.
Tap Edit collections and select some collections you\'d like to see.
Tap the Heart icon on your favourite stories so you can find them here fast.
Any images or videos you delete will stay in the Recycle bin for 30 days before they\'re deleted forever.
Take pictures, shoot videos, and explore the world to fill your Gallery.
We\'ll suggest ways to improve the look of your pictures and free up space here.
Duplicate pictures, old documents, and more will appear here so you can get rid of them easily.
The pictures and videos you\'ve added or changed most recently will appear here.
Try searching with the suggested keyword for more results.
Create a new shared album for these items.
Create stories to keep track of all your amazing adventures.
Start a new story with these pictures and videos.
To search your photos and videos, turn on Personal data intelligence in Settings.
To search, turn on Samsung Core Services in Settings.
Videos of your adventures will be shown here.
Link recipients can view album until %s.
Try downloading a support pack for your search language to improve your results.
Similar story already created. Check it out.
Couldn\'t create story. You might not have enough photos yet, or the description might be too complicated.
Can\'t set image as profile picture. Image not found.
Failed to download image. Try again later.
Failed to download images. Try again later.
Failed to download items. Try again later.
Failed to download video. Try again later.
Failed to download videos. Try again later.
Create a shared album for your family and get bonus storage space.
You\'re using %1$s of the %2$s allowed for your shared family album.
Can\'t save details. Title field empty.
You can select up to %d items.
Rename item or replace existing one?
Unable to open the file. The file type is not supported.
Find photos of yourself fast by selecting your face from the faces in your gallery.
Finding the heart of your story…
To see landmarks and place names in addition to geolocations, turn on Show place names.
Free up some more storage space to copy these items.
Free up some more storage space to copy this image.
Free up some more storage space to copy this video.
Free up some more storage space to move these items.
Free up some more storage space to move this image.
Free up some more storage space to move this video.
DRM (Digital Rights Management) protected files cannot be shared.
Select the rear or front lens as the default view for 360° videos and pictures.
To view images and videos on your Gear VR, insert your phone into your Gear VR.
Can\'t include more than %d images in one GIF.
%1$s made you the leader of the %2$s album.
Select the albums to hide in Gallery. Albums hidden in Gallery may still be shown in other apps. To hide images and videos from all apps, move them to %s.
Select the albums to hide in Gallery.
Pictures and videos taken on the selected dates won\'t appear in automatically created stories.
Selected people and pets won\'t appear in automatically created stories.
Selected people won\'t appear in automatically created stories.
Pictures of them will still appear on the Pictures tab and in albums. They just won\'t appear in searches.
Hide all pictures and videos with them
Hide all pictures and videos that include the selected people and pets, including group shots.
Allow group shots, but hide all pictures and videos where the selected people and pets are alone.
This person will no longer appear on the list of people you can search for.
Have Gallery automatically create a movie using the best parts of the images and videos you select.
Image shared. Tap here to view shared album.
Images that you may not need
Images shared. Tap here to view shared album.
Shake your phone at the same time as someone else to share the picture or video you\'re looking at. You can also select multiple pictures and videos to shake to share them all.
Tap the Edit icon to permanently add slow-mo. Tap the Share icon to send someone the clip you just watched in slow-mo.
Touch and hold a video as it plays to see it in slow-mo. If you like what you see, you can tap the Edit icon to permanently adjust the speed throughout the whole video.
Touch and hold a video as it plays to see it in slow-mo.
Intelligent features only work with still images.
You declined to join this album.
Can\'t join shared album. Invitation expired or cancelled.
Item already in story not added.
Items shared. Tap here to view shared album.
Items already in story not added.
The original will also be deleted.
The original will also be moved to the Recycle bin.
Other members will still be able to use the album, but anything you\'ve added to it will be deleted.
Allow location information to be shown?
To correct the colour of a Log video, swipe up on the video, then tap Correct colour.
Can\'t add files larger than %1$s %2$s to shared albums.
Post pictures to Meitu, create movies with Meitu effects, and edit images with Meitu AI straight from the Gallery app.
Use a Meitu template to quickly create a cinematic movie.
Get notified when people join or leave shared albums.
Albums with the same name will be shown as a single album.
Images or videos stored in %s can\'t be viewed while optimising media.
You won\'t be able to view some of your images or videos until they\'re optimised.
Something went wrong while optimising your media files.
Connect to a network to optimise your %1$s images and videos. You can\'t use images or videos stored in %2$s while they\'re being optimised.
To edit the location for this image, turn on Location in Settings.
Couldn\'t delete video clip from motion photo.
Motion photo cast as still image.
Couldn\'t delete video clips from motion photos.

Move this video to the Recycle bin?
The maximum number of files that can be moved at one time (%d) has been exceeded. Deselect some files and try again.

1 file moved. Couldn\'t move %1$d files in %2$s. Download these files, then try again.
1 file moved. Couldn\'t move 1 file in %s. Download this file, then try again.
Moving image to the Recycle bin…
Moving images to the Recycle bin…
Moving items to the Recycle bin…
Moving video to the Recycle bin…
Moving videos to the Recycle bin…
Multiple faces are tagged as you. Review them and select the right ones.
Select a few essential albums to show, show them all, or something in between. It\'s up to you.
To show all your albums on the Albums tab, turn off Select essential albums in Settings.
%d items added to story. 1 item was in there already.
%1$d items added to story. %2$d items were in there already.
Names help you find faces faster
Names help you find people in searches.
Names help you find pets in searches.
Connect to a device with Smart View to share album.
%s invited you to a new album. Tap here to see it.
Get notified when people share albums with you or delete albums shared with you.
%1$s shared a new album with you. Tap here to check out the %2$s album.
New item added to the %s album.
%1$d new items added to the %2$s album.
%1$s added something to the %2$s album. Tap here to see it.
Get notified when people add images and videos to shared albums.
After %s, Gallery will no longer support syncing with OneDrive.
Back up your Gallery to Samsung Cloud to keep your photos and videos safe and synced with all your devices.
Check out a GIF made from some of your related pictures.
View a collage created from related pictures.
View a story created from related pictures.
View a picture collage created from one of your videos.
A new version of %s is available.
There aren\'t any albums to hide.
Unable to find application to perform this action.
To see where this picture was taken, turn on Show location info in %s.
To see where this video was taken, turn on Show location info in %s.
Duplicate photos and videos will appear here so you can delete them to save space.
No editing suggestions for this image.
No editing suggestions for this video.
All recognised faces have been hidden. Unhide them to see them here.
Everyone in your family can add to, edit, and delete the pictures and videos in your shared album.
None of your apps can perform this action.
You don\'t have any pictures or videos to add to a story yet.
No images or videos edited yet
Items in %s can\'t be shown because of a .nomedia file in this album. Delete the .nomedia file to view your items.
Write down the people, places, and activities you want in your story, then Gallery will automatically create it for you.
You don\'t seem to have any pictures of people on your phone.
You don\'t seem to have any pictures of people on your tablet.
You don\'t seem to have any photos or videos of people or pets.
Tap + at the top of the screen to add pictures and videos.
Stay connected to your friends and family by creating shared albums everyone can add to.
Can\'t open %s. Only Home screen apps available while Maximum power saving mode is on.
Not enough space in shared album storage.
Not enough space on SD card.
Some Gallery features may not work. Go to %s to free up some space.
Showing all content captured on %s even if it\'s not related to the current search.
To keep syncing your pictures and videos with the cloud, upgrade your storage plan or clear some space in OneDrive.
Enjoy 100 GB of extra OneDrive storage free for 6 months just for having a Galaxy phone.
Upgrade your storage plan now so you don\'t run out of room for your pictures and videos.
Keep your images and videos safe and accessible on all your devices by syncing them with OneDrive.
Turn on Sync with OneDrive to make sure your latest pictures and videos are available on all your supported devices.
Share this album with someone to keep it from being deleted on %s.
Share this album to keep it from being deleted on %s.

This Recycle bin shows items deleted from Gallery, My Files, and some third party apps. These items will be permanently deleted after 30 days.\10\10Remember to empty the Recycle bin before removing your SD card to make sure items in the Recycle bin are deleted.
This Recycle bin shows items deleted from Gallery, My Files, and some third party apps. These items will be permanently deleted after 30 days.
Everyone in your family can add to, edit, and delete the pictures and videos in your shared album.
To cast this video, disconnect Smart View, open it in Video Player, then try again.
Not enough space. Free up some space in internal storage, then try again.
To cast images and videos with Smart View, you need to turn on %s in Settings > Apps > Gallery.
Take a moment to select your %s from the faces in your pictures so we can find them next time.
Can\'t play this content because a required permission is denied.
To open %s, tap Settings, go to App info > Permissions, then allow the following permissions:
Unable to use %s. Tap SETTINGS, go to App info > Permissions, then allow the following permissions and try again:
To use this feature, you need to allow permission in Settings.
Used to search your contact list when tagging people in pictures
Used to let you set where your pictures and videos were taken
Used to add soundtracks to stories
Used to show a controller that lets you play or pause slideshows while using Smart View
Used to open, save, edit, and delete pictures and videos
Used to project content over Smart View to another device. It will be shown as screen mirroring if you don’t agree to permissions.
Setting this file as your wallpaper or contact icon will make it visible even when Private mode is disabled. The source file will remain hidden.
Photo assist only works with still images.
Pinch or spread with two fingers to resize.
Can\'t open shortcut. Original file or folder has been deleted.
I agree to let Foursquare collect location data

Foursquare won’t be able to see any of your pictures or videos. They’ll only get GPS coordinates and information about your phone. You can stop sharing your info at any time by turning off Show place names in Gallery settings.
To show landmarks, businesses, and place names, Gallery will let Foursquare process the metadata and location tags in your pictures and videos.
Share shot data and locations with Foursquare?
Hide sensitive photos and videos in your private album to keep them from showing up in Gallery or other apps.
This Recycle bin shows items deleted from your private album. These items will be permanently deleted after 30 days.
Pop the popcorn and cue the nostalgia.
The most captured awards go to…
Make sure we\'ve got the right person for this search.
Let us know what your %s looks like so we can find them next time.
Double tap and hold to compare original and remastered images.
Can\'t remaster pictures with this file type.
Something went wrong while remastering your picture.
Can\'t open file because it\'s corrupted.
Saving your edits will turn this motion photo into a still image.
Remember to empty the Recycle bin before removing your SD card to make sure anything you\'ve added to the Recycle bin is completely deleted.
Stop adding photos and videos of this face?
Remove %d items from this shared album?
Remove keyboard cover to set as Always On Display image.
Remove 1 item from this shared album?
Previously added photos and videos will remain in the album.
New pictures and videos of this person won\'t be added to this album. Any pictures or videos of this person that are already in the album will remain.
This person will no longer be recognised as %s.
To open %s, enable the app in Settings.
Restoring items while roaming may result in additional charges.
If you revert a motion photo taken with a filter or watermark, it can no longer be saved as a motion photo. It can only be saved as a still image.
Combine up to 6 images into an easy-to-share collage.
Combine up to 6 images and videos into an easy-to-share collage.
I agree to allow location data to be used for “Show place names”.
Your device’s geolocation will be collected and processed to show landmarks, businesses, and place names.
We will not be able to see any of your pictures or videos.
You can stop the collection of your device’s geolocation at any time by turning off “Show place names” in the Gallery settings.
For more information about how your data is processed, see the Privacy Policy of Samsung.
Save your changes or discard them?
The original motion photo will remain unchanged. A new image or video copy will be created with the selected object removed.
Save result as image or video?
Save your story or discard it?
Your SD card has corrupt files or other issues. You may want to back it up and replace it soon.
Gallery indexes your photos and videos during charging to improve search results over time.
Gallery indexes your photos and videos while charging to find more people and pets.
Once you have more pictures and videos, Gallery will automatically add them to short video stories for you to enjoy.
Gallery indexes your photos and videos so they\'re searchable. The process happens entirely on your phone. Indexing is faster while charging with the screen off.
To see your pictures and videos in Gallery, you need to allow the %s app to access your files in Settings and restart your phone.
The copy in %1$s will still be shown in Gallery. Remove it from %2$s to keep it from showing.
The copies in %1$s will still be shown in Gallery. Remove them from %2$s to keep them from showing.
Show only the albums you select on the Albums tab instead of showing them all.
Select items to move to the Recycle bin.
Select people and pets to get photo and video suggestions for this album.
Select who to include in album
Select your %s to help find them next time.
The video\'s already playing in its original quality.
Double tap to switch to calendar view.
Double tap to switch to Day-Month-Year view.
Rotate the screen automatically when your phone\'s orientation changes.
Private albums require you to set a screen lock in Settings.
Couldn\'t turn off Album link. Try again.
Couldn\'t turn on Album link. Try again.
Couldn\'t create shared album. Try again.
Your profile picture and name will be shown in the album\'s members list if you join.
Couldn\'t create shared family album. Try again.
Let anyone with the link view the album.
Can\'t share link to this album. The album owner turned off Album link.
Share a link to this album so people can see it on any device.
You\'ve already joined this shared album.
Couldn\'t connect. Check your network connection and try again.
%1$s invited you to join %2$s. Your name and profile picture will be shown in the album\'s members list if you join.
You\'re using %1$s of the %2$s allowed for shared albums.

Something went wrong while downloading these images. Try again.
Something went wrong while downloading these items. Try again.
Something went wrong while downloading this video. Try again.
Something went wrong while downloading these videos. Try again.

Fully zoomed in. Items shown in real ratio.
Spice up your Stories by downloading more background tracks. Download them all for a fresh sound every time you watch a story.
To view this picture, enable %s in Settings.
Card converted. Tap here to share it.
Cover converted. Tap here to share it.
Story pinned to top of Stories list.
Story unpinned from top of Stories list.
Suggest pictures and videos to add to album
Make artistic portraits from pictures of faces.
Save space by deleting documents captured more than 6 months ago.
Show off the best parts of your videos with pre-made clips.
Free up space by deleting extra copies of pictures from your Gallery.
Choose whether to keep these dark, blurry, and overexposed shots.
Reduce file size by deleting video clips from motion photos of things like documents.
Enhance the look of dull, blurry, and low-quality pictures.
Allow the display to show the full range of colour and contrast in HDR pictures.
Switch to photos and videos with all people/pets?
Sign in to your Samsung account to sync your photos and videos across your devices.
Your Microsoft and %s accounts were disconnected on another device, so you can\'t sync Gallery with OneDrive anymore.
Sync your pictures and videos with the Samsung Gallery folder in OneDrive.
Back up your Gallery to Samsung Cloud to keep your photos and videos safe and synced with all your devices.
Keep your pictures and videos safe and available on all your devices by automatically adding them to the cloud.
Try swiping, pinching, and more on the bottom half of the screen.
Pictures of this new %1$s will be kept separate from pictures of your old %2$s, except in searches.
Show hashtags and other tags for pictures and videos.
Tap the Edit icon to permanently add slow-mo.
Tap on highlighted text to select it.
The selected image is already in favourites.
The selected video is already in favourites.
The originals will also be deleted.
The originals will also be moved to the Recycle bin.
No images or videos on clipboard.
These images will be deleted from all synced devices and any copies in %s will be moved to the Cloud Recycle bin.
These images will be deleted from all synced devices and any copies in %s will be moved to the Recycle bin in Gallery.
These items will be deleted from all synced devices and any copies in %s will be moved to the Cloud Recycle bin.
These items will be deleted from all synced devices and any copies in %s will be moved to the Recycle bin in Gallery.
These videos will be deleted from all synced devices and any copies in %s will be moved to the Cloud Recycle bin.
These videos will be deleted from all synced devices and any copies in %s will be moved to the Recycle bin in Gallery.

If you want to know where your photos were taken, you will need to permit the third-party service provider to continuously (even when you are not using the service) have access to your device and acquire certain data listed below.
Please read carefully and understand the third-party service provider’s Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy before giving such permission.
You may withdraw your permission by [turning the option off in More > Settings > Show location info].
Show where your shots were taken?
To show the location in your photos
Service Provider’s Terms and Conditions, Privacy Policy
This image will be deleted from all synced devices and any copies in %s will be moved to the Cloud Recycle bin.
This image will be deleted from all synced devices and any copies in %s will be moved to the Recycle bin in Gallery.
This video is in an unsupported format.
This video will be deleted from all synced devices and any copies in %s will be moved to the Cloud Recycle bin.
This video will be deleted from all synced devices and any copies in %s will be moved to the Recycle bin in Gallery.
Copy of picture saved without 3D effect. Copy can\'t be viewed in 3D on Galaxy XR.
Copy of picture saved without background effect.
Copy of motion photo saved as still image.
Picture saved without 3D effect. Picture can\'t be viewed in 3D on Galaxy XR.
Motion photo saved as still image.
Data will be transferred in the background when the device is connected to a mobile network or WLAN.
Images and videos in the Recycle bin will be permanently deleted after 30 days. Empty the Recycle bin before removing your SD card to make sure SD card items in the Recycle bin can\'t be recovered.
Images and videos in the Recycle bin will be permanently deleted after 30 days.
For security, delete all SD card items from the Recycle bin before removing your SD card.
This image is synced with OneDrive. Deleting it will also remove it from all synced devices and move it to the Recycle Bin in OneDrive.
These images are synced with OneDrive. Deleting them will also remove them from all synced devices and move them to the Recycle Bin in OneDrive.
These items are synced with OneDrive. Deleting them will also remove them from all synced devices and move them to the Recycle Bin in OneDrive.
This video is synced with OneDrive. Deleting it will also remove it from all synced devices and move it to the Recycle Bin in OneDrive.
These videos are synced with OneDrive. Deleting them will also remove them from all synced devices and move them to the Recycle Bin in OneDrive.
This image is synced with OneDrive. Moving it to the Recycle bin will also remove it from all synced devices and move it to the Recycle Bin in OneDrive.
These images are synced with OneDrive. Moving them to the Recycle bin will also remove them from all synced devices and move them to the Recycle Bin in OneDrive.
These items are synced with OneDrive. Moving them to the Recycle bin will also remove them from all synced devices and move them to the Recycle Bin in OneDrive.
This video is synced with OneDrive. Moving it to the Recycle bin will also remove it from all synced devices and move it to the Recycle Bin in OneDrive.
These videos are synced with OneDrive. Moving them to the Recycle bin will also remove them from all synced devices and move them to the Recycle Bin in OneDrive.
This image is synced with Samsung Cloud. Moving it to the Recycle bin will also remove it from all synced devices.
These images are synced with Samsung Cloud. Moving them to the Recycle bin will also remove them from all synced devices.
These items are synced with Samsung Cloud. Moving them to the Recycle bin will also remove them from all synced devices.
This video is synced with Samsung Cloud. Moving it to the Recycle bin will also remove it from all synced devices.
These videos are synced with Samsung Cloud. Moving them to the Recycle bin will also remove them from all synced devices.

All the images and videos in the Recycle bin will be deleted.

Set up two-step verification to see every sign-in attempt and make sure no one can break in to your Samsung account.

You can\'t add more than %d images and videos to a story. You can remove some images and videos from the story and try again.
Try again after the currently playing content ends.
Can\'t view this album. It\'s been removed by its creator.
The name and relationship info of the contact will be removed from Gallery.
This face is linked to a contact. To change its name and relationship info in Gallery, you need to unlink it from that contact.
Tap the Lock icon to unlock your phone and view all your images and videos.
Tap the Lock icon to unlock your tablet and view all your images and videos.
Faces will be restored to their original groups, and the name will be deleted.
A new version of %s is available. Update the app in order to continue.

Wait for the other video to finish being converted, then try again.
Video playback may not be smooth for this codec.
Video saved. Tap here to share it.
Video shared. Tap here to view shared album.
Videos shared. Tap here to view shared album.

View files received using Private sharing.
Manually create your own movie with full control of the music, images, videos, and more.
Wait for current picture to be remastered before remastering another one.
Wait for images to be grouped.
Wait for images to be ungrouped.
Wait for the other video to finish being saved, then try again.
Wait for the image to finish uploading, then try again.
Wait for the Motion photo to finish uploading, then try again.
Wait for the selected items to finish uploading, then try again.
Wait for the video to finish uploading, then try again.

You need to download the image to view it on your phone.
You need to download the image to view it on your tablet.
